source: Real inbox sample (Gmail thread 19e46b7f213adc7e, 2026-05-20), Smile 4 Me Dental via patientsreach.com

input.subject: Confirm your upcoming dental appointment at Smile 4 Me Dental
input.bodyTruncated: Hello Rebekah, You have an upcoming dental appointment(s) at Smile 4 Me Dental starting on Wednesday, May 27, 2026 at 10:30 AM. Please use the buttons below to confirm your appointment or request a callback about this appointment. You can call us directly at +13522439930. Smile 4 Me Dental, 425 Citrus Tower Blvd U 101, Clermont, FL 34711, USA

expected.title: Dental appointment at Smile 4 Me Dental
expected.location: 425 Citrus Tower Blvd U 101, Clermont, FL 34711

notes: Clean dental confirmation — most common shape in inbox. Explicit time + location + provider name. Confidence should be high (>=0.8).
